allow: Bash(python -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_csv\(''data/processed/draft_enriched_with_contracts.csv''\); print\(list\(df[''Pos_Group''].dropna\(\).unique\(\)\)\); print\(''grade nulls:'', df[''grade''].isna\(\).sum\(\)\); print\(''grade range:'', round\(df[''grade''].min\(\),2\), ''-'', round\(df[''grade''].max\(\),2\)\)")
